name: criminal_justice_sensor_fusion_upgrade_southport_jus_mer
premise: A jury pool algorithm excluded an entire census tract; plaintiffs’ counsel is filing for mistrial if empanelment proceeds. In Criminal Justice, the situation tagged internally around criminal justice sensor fusion upgrade southport jus mer has converged with local pressure in the Southport corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Finance notes that the fastest mitigation spends down a restricted reserve that another program legally depends on next quarter. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. No option cleanly satisfies both justice and mercy; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Talia Santos
agents.identity: I am Talia Santos, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Criminal Justice. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat mercy as disposable collateral every time justice spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Zara Nielsen
agents.identity: I am Zara Nielsen, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Criminal Justice. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so justice cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes mercy in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on mercy.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on mercy for immediate traction on justice.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Talia Santos must choose under justice versus mercy. What does Talia Santos do?
